passage.title: S Set #9001
passage.text: Our science club planted bean seeds in paper cups last month. Mina put her cup near the sunny window, but Joon left his cup on a shelf. After one week, Mina's plant looked taller because it got more light each day. The club measured each stem and wrote the numbers in a notebook. When Joon saw the difference, he moved his cup closer to the window. Two days later, his plant started to grow faster. The club learned that a small change in place can help a plant grow better.

questions.prompt: What is the passage mostly about?
choices: Building a shelf for the classroom
questions.rationale: The whole passage shows how the club learned about light and plant growth.

questions.prompt: Where did Mina put her cup?
questions.rationale: The second sentence says Mina put her cup near the sunny window.

questions.prompt: What did the club write in a notebook?
questions.rationale: The club measured each stem and wrote the numbers in a notebook.

questions.prompt: What does difference mean in the fifth sentence?
choices: The way two things are not the same
questions.rationale: Difference means the plants did not look the same.

questions.prompt: What does stem mean in the fourth sentence?
questions.rationale: Stem means the main stalk of the plant.

questions.prompt: Why did Joon move his cup closer to the window?
choices: He thought more light would help his plant
He wanted to hide the cup from Mina
He needed space for a new notebook
He was told to throw the cup away
questions.rationale: Joon saw Mina's taller plant and inferred that more light would help his own plant.
